name: COMTIM Silicone Can Covers for Pet Food Cans, Dog Cat Food Can Lids Covers, Reusable Universal Size Can Toppers Fit Small Medium Large Cans, 4 Pack
description: Suitable for cans of different sizesThe pet food can covers has 3 rings of different sizes with diameters of 65 mm, 75 mm and 85 mm. A can lid fits most standard size dog and cat food cans, such as 3 oz, 5.5 oz, 12.5 oz, 13 oz, 13.2 oz cans. The covers is also suitable for many people’s food cans, such as soup, vegetables and other canned foods.Food grade materialsOur pet food can lids are made of 100% food grade silicone.
